mentions.note: Down 40% last year, up 5% YTD, trading 34x earnings at four-and-half-year low; warming up to stock with franchise at reduced price; reports Feb 3rd, could retrace to $30 low to buy more.
Turnaround accelerating; protein menu driving traffic, especially lower-income consumers; chicken al pastor returns Feb 10; $1.8B buyback approved; strong same-store momentum ahead.
Down 40% from 2024 split entry at $59; group out of favor due to oil surge/food inflation; at 30x earnings with improving fundamentals, attractively valued; buy here.

Stock marking time in 'house of pain' but numbers turning as CEO Scott Boatwright executes well. Stock stuck near $34-35 since earnings; okay to own but restaurant group correlated to gas prices (inverse correlation).
At critical support level of 30; thought it would hold here. Must deliver better-than-expected numbers—crunch time with April 29 earnings. Have to deliver. Waiting for fundamental proof.
First strong quarter in very long time possible.
